Index.title: Welcome to Venecos
Index.description: Premium freelancer service platform. Elevating your brand with top tier Coding, UI Design, and Video Design.

Services.title: Our Premium Services
Services.codingDesc: Expert web and app development using cutting-edge technologies. Build scalable, high-performance applications.
Services.ui_designDesc: Premium UI/UX design with a focus on modern aesthetics, user centric approaches, and responsive layouts tailored to your brand.
Services.video_designDesc: High-quality video production, motion graphics, and post-processing editing to captivate your audience visually.

Contact.title: Join Us
Contact.description: Ready to elevate your project? Get in touch with our team of experts today.

Auth.signupSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account before logging in.
Auth.emailVerified: Email successfully verified! You can now log in.

Dashboard.roleStatus: You are currently signed in as {role}.
Dashboard.announcementText: More features like specialized data tables, settings pages, and task management lists will be available here soon.
Dashboard.adminDesc: You have full access to manage the platform, users, and global settings.
Dashboard.employeeDesc: You can view and update your assigned tasks and communicate with the team.
Dashboard.clientDesc: Track your ongoing projects, download invoices, and manage your applications.

JoinUs.title: Join Our Team
JoinUs.subtitle: Careers at Venecos
JoinUs.description: We're always looking for talented individuals to help us build the future of premium freelancing. Apply today and become part of our growing team.

Apply.title: Apply to Join Venecos
Apply.subtitle: Tell us about yourself and we'll get back to you.
Apply.messagePlaceholder: Tell us why you want to join Venecos and what makes you a great fit...
Apply.successMsg: Thank you for applying! We'll review your application and get back to you soon.
Apply.autoFillNote: Your profile information has been auto-filled. You can edit any field.
